title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
